creator: borjam@sarenet.es
text:
The heartbeat port includes a resource file to start up BSD services. It's installed on /usr/local/etc/ha.d/resource.d/BSDService.

After cvsupping the ports to the now current version, 

Revision 1.17: download - view: text, markup, annotated - select for diffs
Tue Jan 27 10:52:17 2009 UTC (2 months ago) by stefan

the BSDService file is no longer being generated.

How-To-Repeat: cvsup ports and build sysutils/heartbeat.

BSDService will be missing, even though it appears in the pkg-plist file.
